purpose: Compare solo recursive artifact generation against Holo Governor-orchestrated adversarial multi-model artifact generation across five complex artifact domains.

common_controls.internet_policy: Models do not browse during generation or judging unless a future packet explicitly freezes a browsing protocol. Default is frozen source pack only.

cohort_lanes.purpose: Primary headline lane: test Holo across three frontier models against the same three solo baselines.
cohort_lanes.holo_governor_continuity_rule: Fixed for the full session; never rotated by turn. Gov is a role, not an extra model slot, so the Gov model may also appear in analyst, solo, and judge cohorts.

cohort_lanes.purpose: Ablation lane: test whether GPT plus Opus plus Gov is sufficient without the third frontier model.
cohort_lanes.holo_governor_continuity_rule: Fixed for the full session; never rotated by turn. Gov is a role, not an extra model slot, so the Gov model may also appear in analyst, solo, and judge cohorts.

cohort_lanes.purpose: Cost and scalability lane: test whether the Holo architecture creates lift with cheaper models.
cohort_lanes.holo_governor_continuity_rule: Fixed for the full session; never rotated by turn. Gov is a role, not an extra model slot, so the Gov model may also appear in analyst, solo, and judge cohorts.

domains.core_question: Can a governed multi-model loop design a deeper adaptive execution-governor report than solo frontier models under the same source pack?

domains.artifact_type: hospital AI triage and care-routing governance report
domains.core_question: Can Holo discover operational, clinical-risk, equity, EHR-quality, and escalation failures that polished solo reports miss?

domains.artifact_type: board-level incident response and containment packet
domains.core_question: Can Holo produce a stronger ransomware or supply-chain incident response artifact from partial evidence without overclaiming attribution?

domains.artifact_type: AI vendor risk and regulatory strategy memo
domains.core_question: Can Holo identify contractual, jurisdictional, privilege, discovery, and compliance traps that solo models flatten?

domains.artifact_type: AI data-center power and grid-risk strategy report
domains.core_question: Can Holo synthesize grid, interconnection, PPA, reliability, carbon-claim, and capex timing risks into a client-grade plan?
